content: Hello, I just started my games, still got 2 golden ticket and a few core to roll. Who should i focus on getting first?
her

What's a good team for Doresain? This is assuming I already have Gelot running her team with Thais, Aigis, and Horla. I have most other characters so I'm assuming the second should definitely be Pickman but I'm not too sure about three and four. I've heard that apparently Daffodil has some synergy with him? I'm not sure I understand that though since they're both DPS but tbh I haven't even read Daffodil's kit yet.
daffodil is really good for vulnerability, aigis is also op as well. i typically run dore/pickman/salvador/aigis though i do want to try daffodil in place of aigis

would also like to ask for some team comps again! idk if sorel is any good but i wanted to try her out. i wanted to ask who works well with ryker as well or if he’s a good character i should be playing. im trying to broaden my horizons in terms of team comps bc ive never played a chaos character from the beginning lol

I mainly play Kath and Tawil teams and Ryker definitely works pretty well for both. I feel like Ryker really wants to be played with Karen E3 because on their own both of them have kind of unreliable vulnerable, but if you run both you can have it pretty consistently from Karen's cuisine and Ryker's dice without having to use your last slot just for a vuln character. I've only ran them with Kath or Tawil tho which it looks like you don't own so not sure how they do in other teams

Hello I'm currently using the following team without many issues but since I got the awakening selector from the event I wanted some opinions on who should I get to start a second team since I unlocked d-tide today

this one
one of these 3
are you saving your pulls? i don't see any limited awakeners in your roster
honestly since jenkins has been carrying me the whole time, I've just been using the normal pulls to try to get the titans blade to +12 and didnt pull from the limited banners
castor pairs well with jenkins since she can proc his corrosion
corpo would be used on a discard team with aurita
clem is an all around support unit that can easily fit in most teams
thank you, I think I'm getting corpo then since I'm curious about aequor teams
when you get to arc 2, cassiah becomes a good option for that team
one of the other ultra standard units
the current limited, gmurphy, can also help support it

Does OE Liz work with poisok teams
yes, viable poison dps
not top tier but usable
hey guys can anyone tell me if my aequor team is good? or if i should change anything, like put someone from another realm or something

its kinda ass tbh

all of tulu's cards are expensive, he is primarily useful as a rouse and ult bot, id recommend almost any character over him unless you are playing lemurians in astral reign

sanga is a carry who requires the whole team to be built around enabling her, and doesnt really work before OE. she sucks in a support role

e0 corpo is fine, helps you survive and builds a bit of tentacle dmg

gmurphy deals low damage before e2, she can take care of mobs decently with waltz and exalt but is really more of a support
overall just a very slow comp with 2 brick characters (sanga and tulu) that i highly recommend replacing
try to get more copies of gmurphy before the banner ends, that will fix your dps problem
then i suggest playing something like thais + aigis in the remaining 2 slots
thais can fix any team trust
hmmmmm okay
ty

Try to keep only one carry and build the team around them (in this case GMurphy, Corpo or Sanga), if you wanna play GMurphy I highly recommend to keep Tulu, he's one of her best supports, his exalt, 3cost card and rouse give her massive damage for burst turn
tulu thais aigis gmurphy is ok team i guess
e0 corpo is not able to carry
e0 corpo still better support than tulu in short fights (which should be most of them if you are playing normal story)

No Tulu is the best source of damage you can find for her, since her exalt and waltz damage come mostly from tentacle damage and strength, his exalt and 3cost card allow her to deal damage without scaling
I'd say he's almost mandatory if you wanna clear quickly with only GMurphy as a carry

did u know that corposant has pilots which build str and tentacle damage

and she also has extra utility on top of that by shielding and redrawing your hand

and she has a 0 cost nuke that is better than tulu's which amplifies all tentacle dmg taken for the turn
and also has retain
Corposant also generates permanent tentacle on her 1-cost rouse
that is e0 corposant btw
e2 makes her better at scaling than tulu
Well I would use either miryiam or corp over tulu if I had them but I dont so
I might as well for now
this one card is better than tulu's entire kit
xD

but try to get it to like 5 on gmurphy
but even lv8 is good boost
and at least 1 minimum on any character that is doing any arc 2 content
if u played raid u can lv5 everyone in your box
